pricing:
BPA offers three plans:

• Continental (free): up to 10 analyses every 5 hours, savings comparison, and personal analysis history.
• Pro ($4.99/month): unlimited analyses, full per-component pricing, and priority data updates.
• World Tour ($9.99/month): everything in Pro, plus 3-year price-history charts for the complete bike and individual components.

Click the Upgrade button in the top menu to see a detailed comparison.
usage:
Here's how to use BPA:

1. Paste a bike retailer URL into the input box on the home page.
2. Press Analyze. The AI compares the complete bike's retail price against the sum of its individual components.
3. The result screen breaks down each part — groupset, wheelset, frameset, and so on — alongside the total savings.

All your analyses are saved under My History so you can revisit them anytime.
other: Type your question in the input box below. Anything about how the app works, pricing plans, or upcoming updates — feel free to ask, and I'll do my best to help.
